records.description: Institutionally approved AI tool listed by the University of Sheffield for student generative AI use.
records.howToObtain: Access Gemini through the linked Google Gemini app.

evidence.sourceTitle: Using Generative AI | 301 | The University of Sheffield
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Gemini is the University of Sheffield institutionally approved AI tool.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot browser chat available to Uppsala University students and staff with university data-protection coverage.
records.howToObtain: Log in to Copilot with a Uppsala University student account, the same way as other Microsoft services.
records.costToUser: Free access for students; staff access is also stated.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Students at Uppsala University have free access to the AI tool Copilot. Copilot is an AI-driven chat tool from Microsoft.
The service is available in browser form for all students and staff at the university. Log in with your student account.

records.description: Google Gemini app access for U of A users, supported by Information Services and Technology under the University of Alberta Google agreement.
records.howToObtain: Use the Gemini web app or mobile app with a U of A account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Get started with Gemini App - University of Alberta
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Gemini is a generative AI-powered assistant that can help you save time, create captivating learning experiences and inspire fresh ideas — all in a private and secure environment.

evidence.sourceTitle: Get started with Gemini App - University of Alberta
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Gemini app is a core Google Workspace service supported by Information Services and Technology (IST) and is therefore included and protected by the University of Alberta's agreement with Google.

records.description: Preferred and approved UTS GenAI tool when signed into a UTS account, including use with university data.
records.howToObtain: Log in with a UTS ID and password; UTS recommends Edge browser access, with limited access through Bing in other browsers.
records.costToUser: Free for UTS staff and students.

evidence.sourceTitle: UTS Tools - Generative AI - Study Guides
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UTS staff and students have access to Microsoft Copilot. Copilot is a GenAI tool with GPT-4o and DALL-E that generates text or image content based on your prompts.

evidence.sourceTitle: Use of AI in Research | RES Hub - UTS
evidence.evidenceSnippet: At UTS, Microsoft Copilot, when signed into a UTS account, is currently the only approved GenAI tool for use with university data, including internal, sensitive, and confidential information.

records.description: KIT AI toolbox that gives KIT employees and students access to local and external language models through a web interface and API.
records.howToObtain: Use the KI-Toolbox web interface with KIT credentials after completing the AI Competency Module; off-campus use may require KIT VPN.
records.costToUser: Monthly standard budget for external models; direct user cost not specified.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: The KI-Toolbox gives all KIT employees access to various local and external language models (LLMs). There are two separate ways to use them: a web interface for interactive use and an application programming interface (API).
Since the start of the lecture period of the summer semester 2026, the AI toolbox has also been available to students at KIT.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot access with commercial data protection for KIT members who meet Microsoft cloud and training requirements.
records.howToObtain: Authenticate with a KIT account via the central KIT login page after agreeing to Microsoft cloud use and completing the AI training course.

evidence.sourceTitle: Microsoft Copilot - Access with commercial data protection
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The service provides access to the AI application Microsoft Copilot with commercial data protection for KIT members who have agreed to use MS cloud services.

evidence.sourceTitle: Microsoft Copilot - Access with commercial data protection
evidence.evidenceSnippet: All KIT members who have agreed to use Microsoft cloud services have secure access to the generative AI Microsoft Copilot.
